blocks.text: Your global packaging manufacturing partner is just one message away.With production hubs in Vietnam, China, and Thailand, our multilingual export team is ready to support your next packaging project — from quotation and sampling to full-scale production.
Whether you’re sourcing new suppliers, expanding your packaging range, or looking for certified manufacturing capacity, we’ll help you get the answers fast.
Zone B, Qifeng lndustrial Park, Qishi Town, Dongguan City, Guangdong Province, China
1 My Thien residential group, Nhon Town, Viet YenDistrict, Bac Giang Province, Vietnam (opposite to Van Trung 1), Vietnam
Feel Free to Reach Out for Further Details.
